description: Git pre-commit hook validates shell scripts, Fish formatting, YAML, Python syntax, and secrets
steps: Verify .githooks/pre-commit exists and is executable
Verify git core.hooksPath is set to .githooks
Stage a .sh file and verify ShellCheck runs
Stage a .fish file and verify fish_indent runs
Verify secret detection catches test patterns

description: SessionEnd hook generates health report capturing failures, beads, commits, and OTEL metrics
steps: Verify session-report.sh exists and is executable
Verify session-report.sh is wired into SessionEnd hook in settings.json
Run session-report.sh --json and verify valid JSON output
Verify report appends to ~/.claude/harness/session-reports.jsonl

description: Agents can query their own failure history via structured telemetry interface
steps: Verify query-telemetry.sh exists and is executable
Run query-telemetry.sh summary and verify structured output
Run query-telemetry.sh top-failures --json and verify valid JSON
Verify error-rate command produces daily trend

description: Deterministic structural tests enforce shell conventions, Fish function standards, stow integrity
steps: Verify test-architecture.sh exists and is executable
Run test-architecture.sh and verify it produces pass/fail output
Verify it checks shell shebangs, executable bits, Fish --description flags
Verify it checks hook infrastructure and OTEL configuration

description: Cross-references CLAUDE.md against actual codebase state to detect documentation drift
steps: Verify validate-docs.sh exists and is executable
Run validate-docs.sh and verify function table cross-reference
Verify rules file cross-reference works
Verify script reference validation works

description: Periodic entropy management detecting stow symlink drift, PATH parity, theme consistency
steps: Verify detect-drift.sh exists and is executable
Run detect-drift.sh and verify stow symlink checks
Verify PATH parity check between Fish and Zsh
Verify Tokyo Night theme consistency check
Verify stale state file and orphan PID detection

description: Bootstrap script activates all harness components and validates environment readiness
steps: Verify init.sh exists and is executable
Run init.sh and verify it activates pre-commit hooks
Verify it validates all harness scripts are executable
Verify it runs verify-harness.sh to produce initial feature status

description: OTEL LGTM stack captures metrics, events, and traces with Grafana dashboard
steps: Verify OTEL env vars in settings.json
Verify docker-compose.yml and setup-otel.sh exist
Verify Grafana dashboard JSON exists
Verify otel.fish wrapper exists

description: Session state survives context compaction via beads prime, entire checkpoints, and work-detect
steps: Verify bd prime is wired into PreCompact and SessionStart hooks
Verify work-detect.sh runs at SessionStart for resume context
Verify entire checkpoints are wired into session lifecycle
Verify ralph-loop state file tracks iteration progress

description: Harness analyzes failure telemetry and suggests concrete improvements to hooks and tests
steps: Verify suggest-improvements.sh exists and is executable
Run suggest-improvements.sh and verify it reads session reports
Verify it produces actionable suggestions based on failure patterns
Verify suggestions reference specific hooks or tests to add
